name: Shrimp and Pasta Primavera
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the contents of the bag in a 2-quart casserole dish. Cook according to package instructions. Set aside.
2. Place the shrimp in a 2-cup glass measure; cover with vented plastic wrap. Stir halfway through cooking. Microwave on high for 4 minutes or until the shrimp turn pink. Drain and add to the pasta mixture, along with sour cream and dill weed.
